sections.heading: Complications
sections.content: Ascites and abdominal distension: Paracentesis for symptom relief; consider indwelling peritoneal catheter for recurrent ascites [OV-B 5 of 5]. Bowel obstruction: Supportive care with IV fluids, electrolyte management; surgical intervention for mechanical obstruction [OV-B 5 of 5]. Venous thromboembolism (VTE): Prophylactic anticoagulation as per clinical guidelines; therapeutic anticoagulation for established VTE. Pain: Multimodal approach including analgesics, nerve blocks, and palliative radiation for localized pain [OV-6, Palliative Care]. Myelosuppression (neutropenia, anemia, thrombocytopenia): Monitor CBC, use growth factors if indicated [OV-D]. Neurotoxicity (peripheral neuropathy): Dose modifications for platinum/taxane agents; consider alternative agents like pegylated liposomal doxorubicin [OV-D]. Nephrotoxicity: Hydration with cisplatin; monitor renal function [OV-D]. Hypersensitivity reactions to platinum agents: Managed with desensitization protocols or switching agents [OV-E]. Alopecia: Consider scalp cooling for prevention [OV-D]. Immune-related adverse events (irAEs): Monitor for pneumonitis, colitis, endocrinopathies; manage with corticosteroids [OV-D]. Infusion reactions: Premedication and slower infusion rates [OV-E]. Bevacizumab: Hypertension, proteinuria, GI perforation risk; monitor blood pressure and urine protein [OV-D]. PARP inhibitors: Myelosuppression, fatigue, nausea; monitor blood counts and adjust dose [OV-D]. Mirvetuximab soravtansine-gynx: Ocular toxicity, peripheral neuropathy; monitor vision and neurological symptoms [OV-D]. Surgical site infections: Antibiotic prophylaxis and wound care [OV-B]. Lymphedema: Lymph node dissection-related; manage with compression and physical therapy [OV-B]. Bowel complications: Ileus, anastomotic leak; supportive care and potential reoperation [OV-B]. Acute toxicities: Fatigue, dermatitis, gastrointestinal symptoms [OV-D]. Late effects: Fibrosis, secondary malignancies; long-term monitoring [OV-D].
